title: lib
tagline: One require() every script routes AI calls through — free providers first, paid API as a genuine last resort.

title: AI Brain
tagline: Chat with a 3D brain that fires while it thinks, then hands you the prompting lesson. It remembers.

title: Second Take
tagline: Your command failed? A free AI already diagnosed it before Claude starts flailing. Same wall never costs twice.

title: Spend Guard
tagline: A watchdog with a kill-switch, so a runaway AI bot costs at most $20 before everything shuts off and texts me.

title: Malware Scanner
tagline: Six engines and a jury of free models vote on whether a website is hostile. 0% false positives, by design.

title: Laptop Agent
tagline: Queue a task, a headless Claude drives the Mac's GUI itself. Stuck on 2FA? It texts me and waits.

title: Jarvis
tagline: Call the number and Claude picks up. Text it and it texts back. Memory, tools, and a phone line — no app.

title: voice-caller
tagline: An AI that dials a lead, holds a real conversation, books the follow-up, and hangs up. FCC disclosure built in.

title: Cheat Glasses
tagline: Camera sees the homework, Claude solves it, the answer arrives in your ear. The name says what it's for.

title: viral-x
tagline: Reverse-engineers why tweets go viral, writes its own, and learns from real view counts. 100% local, $0.

title: Graham
tagline: Feed it a dossier and it reads a person the way Graham Duncan would — rubric distilled from his actual essays.

title: Samewave
tagline: Log in with Spotify and it scores your vibe against someone else's out of 100, songs to bridge included.
